projects.name: AskFin
projects.description: AI-assisted iOS learning app for driver's license theory questions
projects.notes: First product built on AI App Factory. 17 features implemented. Ready for real testing and release preparation.

projects.name: AI App Factory Core
projects.description: Multi-agent AI development system for autonomous app generation
projects.notes: 9 agents (2 planning + 7 implementation). AutoGen-based pipeline with code extraction, Xcode integration, and git automation.

projects.name: AskFin Premium
projects.description: Premium rebuild of AskFin with adaptive coaching, skill mapping, exam simulation, and motivational feedback. Built on 5 Experience Pillars using factory knowledge.
projects.notes: Premium rebuild. MVP remains untouched. See projects/askfin_premium/PROJECT.md for full spec.
